notes: ResizingService.small_preview(image, max_size=256). For a float downscale skimage defaults anti_aliasing=True and runs scipy.ndimage.gaussian_filter (sigma=max(0,(in/out-1)/2) per axis, mode='mirror') BEFORE the order=0 nearest resample. Gates the C++ small_preview AA prefilter (autoexposure.cpp) used by the metered EV.
